front: How do isotopic labeling methods quantify amino acid turnover?
back: Stable isotope tracers (13C6-leucine, D3-leucine, 15N-glutamine) measure protein synthesis rates via mass spectrometry. Deuterium oxide (D2O) labeling measures long-term synthesis. SILAC (Stable Isotope Labeling by Amino acids in Cell culture) enables quantitative proteomics.
